---
name: Redaction risk
about: Report possible private data or unsafe public release content
title: "Redaction risk: "
labels: ["redaction"]
---

## Location

File or screenshot:

## Risk type

- [ ] credential or account detail
- [ ] endpoint or machine identifier
- [ ] private local path
- [ ] raw log or mailbox content
- [ ] unreleased nonce, route, or diff
- [ ] attribution or source-context issue
- [ ] other

## Details

Explain what should be removed, generalized, or relabeled.
